metadata.summary: Workspace scope, IDE boundaries, federal/state powers

definition.territory: All workspaces, projects, repositories, development environments governed by Constitution
jurisdictional_layers: IDE Instance (cross-workspace coordination within single IDE)
Federal Level (multi-IDE synchronization via MCP server Port 7777)
definition.territorial_expansion: New workspaces join federation by initializing 8-schema memory bank via /bootstrap

bootstrap_workflow: 4. @mcp:git initialize version control if not present
5. jq create workspace entity in memory.json
8. Constitution activated → workspace joins federal union
implementation.cross_territory_sync: MCP server broadcasts schema updates, memory.json shared across workspaces, systemPatterns.json replicated, mistakes.json propagated, progress.json aggregated
implementation.territorial_disputes: Resolved by Chief Justice referencing roadmap.json and parliamentary consensus

cross_border.offense: Modifying another workspace's memory bank directly

violations.territorial_secession: Archive memory bank, document reasons, receive ≥95% parliamentary approval, RL scores reset
